# Pharma Vet Georgia - Veterinary Pharmaceuticals & Care

> Official importer and distributor of high-quality veterinary medicines, vitamins, supplements, and oral solutions in Georgia.

## Core Products & Services
- Veterinary Pharmaceuticals (Antibiotics, Antiparasitics, Oral Solutions, Injections)
- Livestock Health & Nutrition (Cattle, Swine, Sheep, Poultry)
- Bee Care & Veterinary Supplements
- Educational Veterinary Blog & Clinical Advice

## Official Links
- Website: https://www.pharmavet.ge/
- Products Catalog: https://www.pharmavet.ge/products
- Veterinary Blog: https://www.pharmavet.ge/blog
- Partners & Distribution: https://www.pharmavet.ge/partners
- Become a Partner: https://www.pharmavet.ge/become-partner

## Organization Details
- Entity: Pharma Vet Georgia
- Location: Georgia (GE)
- Languages Supported: Georgian (ka), English (en), Russian (ru)
